name: Desire Driver
desc: ​If you control no monsters: You can activate this card; activate 1 "Desire Grand Prix Invitation" directly from your Deck, or, if you have already activated "Desire Grand Prix Invitation" this turn, you can Special Summon 1 "Desire Hero" monster from your Deck instead. For the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Desire Hero" monsters.
